---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature or improvement for erings
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

> **Note:** GUI / user interface changes are handled in the eblitui project.
> Please open those requests against https://github.com/user-none/eblitui
> instead of here.

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature or improvement.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve, or what is the use case?

## Proposed Solution

How you think it should work.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you have thought about, if any.

## Additional Context

Mockups, references, or anything else that may help.
